title: Mark Zuckerberg returns to X after 3 years to unveil Meta's Muse Spark 1.1 AI model, developer API
snippet: Zuckerberg's first activity on the platform in over three years signaled Meta's latest push to compete directly with OpenAI and Anthropic in the rapidly expanding market for enterprise AI models.

title: Lava to launch ‘Virat’ series phones in India, Flipkart availability confirmed

title: Meta's new AI glasses may continuously record what users see and hear: Report

title: Pixel 11 launch date revealed: Made by Google event announced for August 12
snippet: Google's next Made by Google launch event is set for August 12, 2026, in New York City.

title: ChatGPT image generation down- OpenAI says ‘implementing mitigation’
snippet: ChatGPT faced a widespread outage on Tuesday, with users reporting issues generating images and accessing past chats. OpenAI confirms it's investigating.

title: Apple now asks users before sending Apple Intelligence requests to Google Cloud
snippet: Apple's integration of Google's AI has improved features but requires sharing user data with Google Cloud.&nbsp;

title: Apple finally brings back card payments for subscriptions and App Store purchases in India
snippet: Apple has resumesdcard payments for App Store purchases in India after a four-year hiatus. Initially, only Visa and Mastercard will be accepted.&nbsp;

title: Apple could bring back its iPhone X playbook for the iPhone Ultra
snippet: Apple could be planning to use the iPhone X playbook with the iPhone Ultra by delaying the initial pre-sales and orders for the foldable iPhone.

title: New AI agent can hack systems and deploy ransomware without human help
snippet: A new report reveals that AI agents can autonomously execute ransomware attacks, evidenced by the case of JADEPUFFER, which exploited a critical vulnerability to infiltrate systems.&nbsp;

title: Bill Gates heir’s shopping app claimed sales it didn’t drive
snippet: Phia, co-founded by Phoebe Gates, faces accusations of violating affiliate marketing policies. The browser extension allegedly claimed sales it did not drive by injecting its own referral codes. Independent researchers and competitors like Capital One Shopping highlighted these concerning practices.
